# Prince Sarfo — Software Developer

> Personal portfolio of Prince Sarfo, a software developer based in Ghana.

## About

Prince Sarfo is a Computer Science graduate from KNUST with hands-on experience building scalable web and mobile applications, REST APIs, and distributed systems. Proficient in Node.js, RESTful API design, database management, authentication, and system integration.

## Skills

- **Frontend:** React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, React Native, HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- **Backend:** Node.js, REST APIs, Firebase, PostgreSQL, JWT Auth
- **Tools:** Git, GitHub Actions, Figma, Adobe Photoshop, Expo

## Work Experience

- **Software Developer (Freelancing)** — Mar 2025–Present
- **Software Developer (NSS), Nyeova Systems, Accra** — Oct 2024–Aug 2025
- **Software Intern, Mpact Lane Consult, Kumasi** — Sep 2023–Dec 2023
- **Design Intern, Quality Image, Kumasi** — Sep 2022–Dec 2022

## Education

- BSc. Computer Science, KNUST — Jan 2021–Sep 2024

## Projects

- **UniKonnect** — Campus events mobile app with Firebase and Paystack
- **SafePing** — Emergency safety app with OTP, location sharing, and push notifications
- **OneMillion** — Cross-platform donation platform (web, mobile, desktop)
- **Kuro** — Web and mobile app for residential communities in Africa
- **PigeonUltra** — Migrated to Next.js with TypeScript, blog and auth flows
- **Pappysko** — Property listing web app with Google Maps integration
